subcodes.first_line: O My Name Mahdi! Upon thee be My glory and My remembrance and My praise. Blessed art thou for having kept faith with My Covenant and spread abroad My remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی مهدی علیک بهائی و ذکری و ثنائی طوبی لک بما وفیت میثاقی و نشرت ذکری
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
